description:
An enhanced audio panel for Windows


What's Changed
- Remove "You just lost the game" easter egg by @ChrisLauinger77 in #92
- Enhances logging, updater logic by @ChrisLauinger77 in #93
- Localize updater status and error messages by @ChrisLauinger77 in #94
- Display headsetcontrol submodule commit hash in settings by @ChrisLauinger77 in #95
- Update translation source files by @github-actions[bot] in #96
- Update Korean by @VenusGirl in #97
- Update compiled translations by @github-actions[bot] in #98
- Avoid headset polling when tray click hides panel by @ChrisLauinger77 in #99
Full Changelog: 1.16.1...1.16.2
